headline: Botswana FIRST BASELINE (rotation substitute) — Published 67.5 Established confirmed. Stable democratic governance; 2024 peaceful transition (Boko-led UDC government replaced 58-year BDP rule); strong HIV/AIDS response infrastructure (model treatment program); 2019 High Court decision decriminalizing same-sex relations confirmed by Court of Appeal. Diamond economy faces structural challenges (revenue decline); rising inequality and youth unemployment are negative pressures. Net assessment: confirm at 67.5 Established with internal -1.0 dimensional pressure from economic-strain context (sub-threshold).

scoring_rationale.AWR: 3.6 unchanged. Established detection and reporting infrastructure.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 3.7 unchanged. HIV/AIDS program serves as model responsiveness anchor.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.7 unchanged. 2019 same-sex relations decriminalization sustained at Court of Appeal level.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3.8 unchanged. Stable institutional boundaries; 2024 peaceful transition confirms.
scoring_rationale.INT: 3.8 unchanged. 58-year ruling-party loss without crisis = high I1 Consistency Under Pressure.

key_evidence: 2024 peaceful democratic transition: Boko-led UDC government replaced 58-year BDP rule without crisis.
HIV/AIDS treatment program serves as global model.
2019 High Court decision decriminalizing same-sex relations confirmed by Court of Appeal.
Stable institutional infrastructure across multiple generations.
Diamond economy structural challenges (revenue decline); rising inequality; youth unemployment — economic-strain pressures.

evidence.finding: 67.5 Established placement reflects sustained democratic governance and HIV/AIDS response.

negativeSignals: Diamond revenue decline; rising inequality; youth unemployment.
positiveSignals: Peaceful transition 2024; HIV/AIDS treatment model; LGBTQ legal protection.
sector_context: Southern Africa / democratic-stability cluster. Botswana is the regional standout — contrasts with Eswatini (9.4 Critical) and Lesotho (35.9 Developing) in immediate region.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
